title: Better 3D Beds
description: Better 3D Beds is a texture pack for Minecraft that significantly enhances the appearance of beds in the game, making them more realistic and detailed with new 3D models. This texture replaces the old bed models with more beautiful and immersive versions.
body:
![Beds 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58db3f06c5a6b04240da71548b832bb3ddc365b5.png)

### **Optifine Required**

Better 3D Beds is a texture pack for Minecraft that significantly enhances the appearance of beds in the game, making them more realistic and detailed with new 3D models. This texture replaces the old bed models with more beautiful and immersive versions.

Better 3D Beds transforms the sleeping experience in Minecraft by introducing improved 3D models for all beds. This texture replaces the old 2D models with more detailed and realistic designs, offering a much more pleasing visual experience. Each bed now features a three-dimensional look, adding depth and detail that enhance the overall aesthetics of the game.

Key changes:
- New, detailed 3D models for all beds
- More realistic and immersive appearance
- Replacement of old 2D models with three-dimensional designs

With Better 3D Beds, beds in Minecraft have never looked so comfortable and elegant. This texture pack is perfect for players who want to add a touch of realism and beauty to their game world.

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
